data.title: Umatoll Colorful Lighting Baby Balance Bike Toys for 1 Year Old Boys Gifts, Adjustable Seat Baby Walker, One Year Old Boy Bir

features: GLOW REAR WHEEL: Colorful lighted rear wheels are more eye-catching to make babies more interested
inspires their curiosity. Bring more fun to your baby. No batteries required
just spin the wheels to glow.

SAFETY FIRST: 135° steering limiter effectively prevents the baby from turning over. Fully enclosed wheels to avoid clamping baby's feet. TPU handle makes baby's grip firm and hard to get off. No sharp parts
making your baby safer.
ADJUSTABLE SEAT: The 3-position adjustable seat is more suitable for babies aged 12-24 months. Note: After adjusting the seat to hear the seat "click" to be considered successfully fixed seat.
HIGH-QUANLITY MATERIAL: The aluminum main frame is lighter and stronger
weighing only 1.5 kg (3.3 lbs)
making it easy for your baby to ride and stride. EVA wheels are quiet and non-slip
perfect for baby to ride indoors and outdoors.
PERFECT GIFT for 1-2 Year Old: The toddler bike brings babies fun and joy
while helps develop their balance
control and leg strength. Removable baskets can hold baby's beloved small toys. No need tools
it only takes a few minutes to complete the installation. Perfect first birthday gift for 1 year old boys!
